text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it was you who summoned for yours truly—the
Overlord herself—T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Then I shall answer your call. For it is my life's calling to have my strength and beauty shine as far as the very horizon!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, we depart! Come, follow me! Haaa ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
